mapper.insert: INSERT INTO submissions (assignment_id, student_id, file_path, file_name, content_hash, similarity_pct, status, content_text) VALUES (#{assignmentId}, #{studentId}, #{filePath}, #{fileName}, #{contentHash}, #{similarityPct}, #{status}, #{contentText})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM submissions WHERE assignment_id = #{assignmentId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT * FROM submissions WHERE assignment_id = #{assignmentId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC, submission_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submissions WHERE assignment_id = #{assignmentId}
SELECT * FROM submissions WHERE assignment_id = #{assignmentId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC, submission_id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE submissions SET final_score = #{finalScore}, final_comment = #{finalComment} WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId}
